case_title: ANTHONY J. RIZO VS. BESTRANS EXPRESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RIZO, ANTHONY J. AS TO DEFENDANT BESTRANS EXPRESS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE* FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIZO, ANTHONY J. AS TO DEFENDANT BESTRANS EXPRESS, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RIZO, ANTHONY J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-05-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BESTRANS EXPRESS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BESTRANS EXPRESS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. WRONG VENUE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY WEI MING YAN--DRIVE/OWNERSHIP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
